figures.caption: Fig. 2: Pareto frontier showing the trade-off between accuracy (weighted IoU) and energy efficiency across different platforms and model sizes. FPGA on-chip: models UNet skip connections stored on chip, FPGA off-chip: models UNet skip connections stored off chip in the memory

TABLE IV: Comparison of throughput (θ), IoU, and energy efficiency for various model precisions on RPi5, Orin Nano, Edge TPU, and FPGA with skip connections mapped to on-chip and off-chip memory at batch size 1.

TABLE I: Comparison of U-Net variants with different channel scaling factors, with and without knowledge distillation (KD). The Hybrid-Segmentor model was proposed by Goo et al [1]. SegFormer B5 is included as a high-capacity reference.
